raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the key innovation but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue (mutex vs lock-free) with a localized fix (revision suggestions).",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta (wait-freedom is not the strongest progress guarantee in the literature).",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (evaluation numbers are unanchored).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (claims about linearizability and portability are misleading).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the key innovation but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue (mutex vs lock-free) with a localized fix (revision suggestions).
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta (wait-freedom is not the strongest progress guarantee in the literature).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (evaluation numbers are unanchored).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (claims about linearizability and portability are misleading).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
